tool_name: Power Transformer Loading, No-Load/Load Losses & Economic Loading Factor

inputs.name: Transformer Rated Power (S_rated)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: No-Load (Core / Iron) Loss (P0)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Full-Load (Copper / Short-Circuit) Loss (Pk)
inputs.note: From factory test report at rated current
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Actual Operating Load (S_load)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Load Power Factor (cos φ)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Annual Operating Hours
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Discrete count variable, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Electricity Cost for Loss Valuation
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7 — Market parameter Type B: cost/price estimates ±5%

formulas: beta = actual_load_kva / rated_kva   // [p.u.] Per-Unit Load Factor (β) Reference: IEC 60076-1:2011 §7 — loading factor definition
P_total_w = no_load_loss_w + beta^2 * load_loss_w   // [W] Total Losses at Operating Load Reference: IEC 60076-1 §10 — total transformer loss: P = P0 + β²·Pk

P_out_w = actual_load_kva * load_power_factor * 1000; eta_transformer_pct = P_out_w / (P_out_w + P_total_w) * 100   // [%] Transformer Efficiency at Operating Point Reference: IEC 60076-1 §10.3 — transformer efficiency

beta_eco = Math.sqrt(no_load_loss_w / load_loss_w)   // [p.u.] Economic Loading Factor (β_eco) — Minimum Loss Point Reference: IEC 60354:1991 §5 — economic loading for minimum total losses: β_eco = √(P0/Pk)
E_loss_kwh = (P_total_w / 1000) * operating_hours_yr   // [kWh/yr] Annual Energy Lost in Transformer Reference: IEC 60354 — annual loss calculation

loss_cost_usd_yr = E_loss_kwh_yr * electricity_rate_usd_kwh; beta_max_ambient = (ambient_temp_c <= 40) ? 1.0 : 1.0 - (ambient_temp_c - 40) * 0.01   // [USD/yr, p.u.] Annual Loss Cost & Temperature-Corrected Load Limit Reference: IEC 60354 §4 — continuous rating derating above 40°C ambient

V1.error_msg: Loading > 120%: overload condition — IEEE C57.12 §12 limits short-time overload; check thermal withstand duration

V2.error_msg: Load exceeds temperature-derated capacity: winding insulation ageing accelerated per IEC 60076-7 thermal model

V3.error_msg: Transformer heavily under-loaded (<20%): consider downsizing — no-load losses dominate total annual loss cost

smart_warnings.message: Loading > 90%: limited headroom for fault current — coordinate protection relay settings and evaluate parallel transformer option
Operating load deviates >30% from economic load point: significant excess losses — reconfigure load balance across transformers if multiple units in service
Efficiency < 97.5% on medium-power transformer: below IEC 60076-1 typical threshold — check for aged core or damaged windings
Ambient > 45°C: forced-air cooling (ONAN→ONAF) may be required per IEC 60076-7 §7; verify cooling class
Annual loss cost exceeds USD 50,000: evaluate amorphous core transformer (P0 reduction ~70%) — typically pays back in 3–5 years

fmea.effect: Loading > 120%: overload condition — IEEE C57.12 §12 limits short-time overload; check thermal withstand duration
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Load exceeds temperature-derated capacity: winding insulation ageing accelerated per IEC 60076-7 thermal model
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Transformer heavily under-loaded (<20%): consider downsizing — no-load losses dominate total annual loss cost
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Loading > 90%: limited headroom for fault current — coordinate protection relay settings and evaluate parallel transformer option
Operating load deviates >30% from economic load point: significant excess losses — reconfigure load balance across transformers if multiple units in service
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Math.abs(beta - beta_eco) > 0.3

fmea.failureMode: Efficiency < 97.5% on medium-power transformer: below IEC 60076-1 typical threshold — check for aged core or damaged windings
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: eta_pct < 97.5 && rated_kva > 1000

fmea.failureMode: Ambient > 45°C: forced-air cooling (ONAN→ONAF) may be required per IEC 60076-7 §7; verify cooling class
Annual loss cost exceeds USD 50,000: evaluate amorphous core transformer (P0 reduction ~70%) — typically pays back in 3–5 years
